raw_reaction: 正しいが、時間順序指数やDyson展開の既存解を、Magnus展開の可換な場合と言い直しているだけに近い。生涯忘れない別解ではない。
reason: The candidate correctly derives the expectation from a scalar time-ordered evolution whose Magnus expansion has no commutators, but it is essentially the existing time-ordered exponential/Dyson solution under different language, so it is not distinct enough for the exact target line.
